name: Zekun Wang
title: PhD Student in Computer Science
bio:
I'm a CS PhD student at **Georgia Tech**, advised by **Christopher MacLellan**. My research sits at the intersection of continual learning, compositional structure, and large language models — asking how an agent can keep learning new skills for a lifetime without overwriting what it already knows.

Most of my recent papers attack this from three angles: bounding the geometry of weight updates, learning compositional concept primitives, and using generative models as exploration scaffolds for reinforcement learning.
